name: USP Group Limited
summary: USP Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the distribution of marine products primarily under the Mercury brand in Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, and Brunei. It operates through Property Investments, Marine Distributors and Dealerships, Calibration of Environmental Equipment, and Others segments. The company distributes environmental and building products, and pharmaceutical and lab calibration devices; and invests in properties. In addition, it is involved in the research, development, engineering, manufacturing, and consultancy for the biofuel industry; and trading of mechanical and electronic scientific and industrial instruments, air purification products, outboard motors, and general merchandise. Further, the company wholesales industrial machinery and equipment, marine equipment, and accessories; and medical, professional, scientific, and precision equipment. Additionally, it is involved in the development of real estate properties; and letting of properties and general traders, as well as provides property agency services. The company was formerly known as Unionmet (Singapore) Limited and changed its name to USP Group Limited in March 2015. USP Group Limited was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Singapore.
